request: Design approaches to collect detailed MoE routing statistics for Kimi-K2.5 to validate smoothed/sliding-window routing schemes. Need to understand: expert usage patterns per prompt context, temporal locality of expert selection, layer-wise routing behavior, and impact of constraining expert pools.

approach_a.scope: Instrumentation approach: Hook into kTransformers at submit_forward() to log all topk_ids and topk_weights with full context

approach_b.scope: Simulation approach: Use existing activation statistics collection (--record-kt-gpu-expert-distribution) with custom analysis pipeline

approach_c.scope: Proxy model approach: Use smaller MoE model (Qwen3-MoE, MiniMax) to develop analysis pipeline before scaling to Kimi-K2.5

approach_d.scope: Visualization and analysis tooling: What metrics and visualizations best reveal expert locality patterns?
